ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the issue */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned as the owner of the ticket */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of the ticket (e.g., Bug report, Feature request) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket (e.g., normal, critical) */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component affected by the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was created */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the ticket */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version where the issue was first reported */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the ticket was last updated */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution status of the ticket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the ticket */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* Attachments related to the ticket */,
  "reported_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the ticket */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for resolving the ticket */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* How often the issue can be reproduced */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system where the issue was reported */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment details */,
  "repro_steps" TEXT /* Steps to reproduce the issue */,
  "related_tickets" TEXT /* IDs of related tickets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_reported_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_ticket_type FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_type") REFERENCES ticket_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, QA Engineer, Project Manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "parent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_parent_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket type (e.g., Bug report, Feature request) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., normal, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., New, In progress, Resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the software version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current release */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* Date when the version will no longer be supported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private */,
  "reply_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment this comment is a reply to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_reply_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attachment is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Developer, QA Engineer, Project Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
